summary: User Lookup | View Datadog Logs Form User-Lookup
description: As a User-Lookup tool user, I want the ability to view a client's Datadog logs without needing to create a custom query and search Datadog myself. This will streamline the process of debugging and resolving user issues.
gherkin:
When the user clicks on the "User Lookup" tile
Then the user lands on the User Lookup page
When the user enters "dm5tv2@gmail.com" in the "Okta ID / Email" field
And the user clicks the "Search" button
Then the user should see "DataDog Logs" button

steps.action: *When* the user clicks on the "User Lookup" tile
steps.result: *Then* the user lands on the User Lookup page
